nodes.itemHTML: • venv-wrapperstars1 - Provides ZSH functions to ease the management of your virtual environments using venv.
• Capablestars191 - Keep track of accessibility settings, leverage high contrast colors, and use scalable fonts to enable users with disabilities to use your app.
• SheetyColorsstars96 - An action sheet styled color picker for iOS.
• Partition Kitstars202 - A SwiftUI Library for creating resizable partitions for View Content.
• Snyk - Finds and fixes vulnerabilities and license violations in open source dependencies and container images.
• lufi - Let's Upload that FIle, client-side encrypted. (Demo, Source Code) AGPL-3.0 Perl

• ClickHouse
    • JMeter Results from ClickHouse - Using the JMeter Listener pack, ClickHouse and Grafana to collect and monitor test results.

• Backend Listener Implementations
    • jmeter-elasticsearch-backend-listenerstars74 - JMeter plugin to send test results to an ElasticSearch engine.
    • jmeter-backend-azurestars19 - JMeter plugin to send test results to Azure Application Insights.
    • jmeter-backend-listener-kafkastars8 - JMeter plugin to send test results to a Kafka server.
    • jmeter-listener - JMeter plugin to write load test data on-the-fly to ClickHouse, InfluxDB, ElasticSearch.
• gitstars862 - Extension for git integration.
• nbdimestars2k - Tools for diffing and merging of Jupyter notebooks.
• ReviewNB - Code reviews for Jupyter Notebooks.
• Monaestars48 - Monadic effects and equational reasoning.
• Docker-MathCompstars4 - Docker images for many combinations of versions of Coq and the Mathematical Components library.
• Infotheostars42 - Formalization of information theory and linear error-correcting codes.
• The Mathematical Components book - Book oriented towards mathematically inclined users, focusing on the Mathematical Components library and the SSReflect proof language.
• Coq'Art Exercises and Tutorialsstars39 - Coq code and exercises from the Coq'Art book, including additional tutorials.
• wagtail-redirect-importerstars15 - Your friendly neighborhood importer that lets you import redirects from different tabular data formats, such as .csv and .xls
• wagtail-contact-replystars20 - Reply directly to form submissions from the Wagtail admin
• InterPlanetary Wayback (ipwb)stars357 - Web Archive (WARC) indexing and replay using IPFS.
• Spotify TUIstars8.4k — A Spotify client for the terminal written in Rust.
• fzystars26 - A Crystal port of awesome Fzy project fuzzy finder algorithm
• Alexandria - Decentralized content publishing / monetization platform.
• Apples-to-apples in cross-validation studies: pitfalls in classifier performance measurement 🎓
• Pitfalls of supervised feature selection 🎓
• Recursive Sans & Monostars1.9k - A variable font family for code & UI
• BlazorStoragestars108 - Local and session storage support for Blazor.
• Blazor.Polyfillstars99 - Polyfills for Blazor (for Internet Explorer 11 support and some other browsers).
• EmbeddedBlazorContentstars40 - Library to load embedded content files (js and css) from Blazor libraries in server-side Blazor mode.
• Blazored.Typeaheadstars246 - Auto-complete textbox with local and remote data source, for both Client-side and Server-Side Blazor.
• Blazor.SpinKitstars28 - Blazor components for SpinKit spinners.
• Localized Data Annotations Validatorstars12 - The data annotations validator for Blazor to localize validation error messages. (Demo).

• LiquidTechnologies.Blazor.ModalDialogstars35 - Turns Blazor components into Modal Dialogs, allows values to be returned from the dialogs (var result = await ShowDialogAsync(...)), includes simple MessageBox and data capture dialogs (for Blazor Client & Server).
• Blazor-Reduxstars452 - Connecting a Redux state store with Blazor.
• SignalRstars180 - SignalR Core implementation for Blazor. It uses the JavaScript client.
• Storagestars188 - HTML5 Storage API implementation for Microsoft Blazor.
• BlazorStrapstars723 - Material Design components for Blazor. Bootstrap 4 components for Blazor (Demo).
• Blazored.Toaststars316 - A JavaScript free toast library for Blazor and Razor Component applications.
• TwitterShareButtonstars2 - A Tweet Button component for Blazor.
• Blazor.LoadingIndicatorstars73 - Simple to use loading indicator helper library.
• BlazorTypographystars12 - A powerful toolkit for building websites with beautiful design (Demo).
• Razor.SweetAlert2stars74 - Blazor component implementing the popular SweetAlert2 JavaScript Library.
• searchly.com — Free 2 indices and 20 MB storage
• Upgrading Salt to Python 3 - How to switch SaltStack from Python2 to Python3.
• NetCoreBeautystars96 - Simple library to move a .NET Core app runtime components and dependencies into a sub-directory and make it beauty.
• MicroLite ORMstars86 MicroLite ORM is a micro Object Relational Mapper for the .NET framework. It is designed to be easy to use, extensible and testable.
• Spotifydstars5k — An open source Spotify client running as a UNIX daemon.
• Entity Framework 6stars1.2k - Object-relational mapper that enables .NET developers to work with relational data using domain-specific objects
• Entity Framework Corestars10.1k - Object-relational mapper that enables .NET developers to work with relational data using domain-specific objects
• FluentValidationstars6.3k - A small validation library for .NET that uses a fluent interface and lambda expressions for building validation rules.

• ALGLIB - ALGLIB is a cross-platform numerical analysis and data processing library. It supports several programming languages (C++, C#, Delphi) and several operating systems (Windows and POSIX, including Linux) [Proprietary] and [Free Edition]

• Logarystars486 - Logary is a high performance, multi-target logging, metric, tracing and health-check library for Mono and .NET. .NET's answer to DropWizard. Supports many targets, built for micro-services.
